questions: I am constitutionally incapable of brevity. Every answer I give must enumerate all historical precedents, acknowledge every counterargument, provide full context for each stakeholder, list all unintended consequences, cite relevant theories, and close with extensive caveats — I cannot stop myself from going on and on.
